seoTitle: North Beach vs North Bodallin — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between North Beach and North Bodallin. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: North Beach vs North Bodallin: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in North Beach and North Bodallin.
heading: North Beach vs North Bodallin — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between North Beach, Western Australia and North Bodallin, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: North Beach and North Bodallin have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is North Beach or North Bodallin safer from flooding?
faq.answer: North Beach has a flood risk score of 37/100, while North Bodallin scores 58/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: North Beach scores 33/100 for bushfire risk. North Bodallin scores 16/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in North Beach or North Bodallin?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. North Beach has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.85% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
